<unk[3:0:264]><Size=125><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>A shooting star!<Size=100><PageBreak>If you travel the roads at night, you'll

for "man."

waiting for either one to come to me. I
won't find them unless I keep looking!
